overview: CMR Technical Campus (CMRTC), established in 2009 by the CMR Technical Education Society, is a premier UGC Autonomous engineering college located in Kandlakoya, Hyderabad. It is part of the extensive CMR Group of Institutions and is recognized for its high-tech infrastructure and focus on innovation-driven technical education.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade and NBA (National Board of Accreditation). Approved by AICTE and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, AI, ECE, IT)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry + TS EAPCET rank
Graduation with 45-50% aggregate + TS ICET rank
B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE / TS PGECET

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions follow the TGCHE guidelines. 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via state-level web counseling based on entrance ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit or JEE scores. The application process for the 2026-27 session typically begins in mid-2026.
admissions.importantDates: TS EAPCET 2026: May 9 - 11, 2026; TS ICET 2026: May 13 - 14, 2026; MBA Registration: Mar - May 2026.

facilities: Separate Hostels for Boys (₹1.10L/pa) and Girls (₹1.0L/pa)
campus.specialNote: The campus is noted for its high-tech 'Innovation Hub' and dedicated R&D cells for every department. It consistently ranks within the top private engineering colleges in Telangana and maintains a strong alumni network across global tech firms.
